summary: This is a brief announcement post, not a substantive blog entry. Joel Spolsky simply notifies readers about an upcoming speech he is giving at Cornell University. The post contains no argument, analysis, or insight — just logistical details: the time (5pm) and location (Phillips 203). It appears to have been written as a quick update for readers who might want to attend.
key_points: Joel was giving a speech at Cornell University, his alma mater
The post serves purely as a logistical announcement with time and room number
No substantive content or argument is present in this post
key_insight: This is a logistical announcement with no substantive content to analyze.
